narrative:
North Canton 1-A (precinct in Stark County) has 780 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
